item.title: This is lil Rosie in her pink regalia dancing a "male chicken dance".
item.dc:creator: dolphinyaso

item.title: A Caturday story.
item.description: I may not be an old woman, but of my 6 cats, one was a gift, one I rescued from a drug house, two were abandoned after being left in my care, 1 was a feral cat one of the others brought home, and the latest was abandoned by a former tenant of my landlord's. He figured I knew something about cats. EDIT: Thanks for making this one go viral. For all of you complaining about the tears, just think every time I read your comments, I tear up as well. FWIW, I have several rescues and posted their stories the other day: https://imgur.com/gallery/tNse54i Check them out as they are my best companions and the reason why I get out of bed every afternoon. (I've always been a knight owl)
item.dc:creator: Swiggy1957

item.title: “Was my position eliminated or not?”
item.description: FP EDIT: Yay! Front Page! I just wanted to add that I’ve never worked in food service but after watching the movie ‘Waiting…’ and more recently the Hulu series ‘Bear’ I have a new found respect for everyone that works in the restaurant industry. I’ve always known it’s difficult for all restaurant staff but was clueless as to how much work really goes into running a restaurant. Especially through the pandemic. So if you are in that line of work, hats off to you and thanks for all you do!
item.dc:creator: dorenavant

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Lala
item.description: Clearly, people aren’t the only ones who thought Lala did a good job. Because many cats enjoy watching their owners play Stray. Both humans and their felines friends have quickly fallen in love with the game and the cats in it, and of course Lala helped that play a role in that when she appeared in the voice with her extraordinary performance. We don’t know yet whether Lala plans to continue voice acting in future projects, but we really hope that she does. #current_events #mildly_interesting #mildly_amusing #cats #animals #gaming #cool
item.dc:creator: mfrybeasley

item.title: player almost interrupts bat boy from doing his job
item.dc:creator: DizzleSenpai

item.title: Crime of Century - Global Warming Denial plot by Big Oil
item.description:
Source: https://www.bbc.com/news/science-environment-62225696
This whole scheme is how the Petroleum Industry conspired to manage the message and convince legislators and people around the world that climate change is only a natural process and not man-made. Many millions of people and most importantly most Republican Senators still believe this, which has led to total inaction by the US. We’ve run out of time, as record temps around the world and Greenland losing 6 billion tons of glacial ice PER DAY. If you care at all about the future of Earth, call your states Republican Senators especially and demand that they join in on bipartisan legislation and action by the US. We also need pressure on Joe Manchin. These are desperate times and as this article reveals, Industry did everything they could to hide it and prevent action. Thank you! Your phone call is much more important than your vote!
Cat tax
item.dc:creator: DaveSamsonite

item.title: Apocalyptic warfare - art by Mike Franchina
item.description:
St. Domnica of the Zweihänder from Franchina's art series about the zealots of New Antioch vs the horrors of Hell
Goetic Knight
Flak Battery
New Antioch Combat Engineer
Procession
Specimen Division Combat Biologist
Larval Beast Lord
Heretic Trooper
Mongrel Supplicants, granted the voice of the Beast
Trench Shrine
Observer
Nurse
New Antioch Leper Rifleman
Heretic Death Commando
Yersinia Rex Source: https://www.artstation.com/sirfrancisdrake
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Found a cactus growing out of a tollway road in Dallas
item.description:
Pretty high up. A local photographer has already named it "Pointy McPointFace" Can be seen to the left of the Oaklawn exit north of Downtown Dallas on the Dallas Tollway. According to some friends its been growing for 6 years
Blurry bell cat tax
item.dc:creator: ArtSparkle

item.title: ? FIRST THE CAME FOR THE TRANS PEOPLE ?
item.description:
https://twitter.com/esqueer_/status/1550133739732099073?s=21&t=xNFmFwsNQU1e90-cSlheMA
Links to all of the relevant docs. Notice of hearing: https://ww10.doh.state.fl.us/pub/medicine/Agenda_Info/Public_Information/Notices/2022/August/08052022_FB_Notice.pdf Agenda for hearing: https://ww10.doh.state.fl.us/pub/medicine/Agenda_Info/Public_Information/Agendas/2022/August/08052022_FB_Agenda.pdf The public book basis for their "evidence". https://ww10.doh.state.fl.us/pub/medicine/Agenda_Info/Public_Information/Public_Books/2022/August/08052022_FB_Publicbook.pdf
